scope: Short parity-only batch for Infusion Matrix failure/stabilizer/symmetry/FX, Arcane Workbench edge cases, Aura Node/Thaumometer/Goggles HUD/scan parity.
changes: InfusionInstabilityEvents now exposes triggerWeightedEvent(...) so terminal failure can reuse the TC4 weighted table without a second maybeTrigger probability gate.
TC4InfusionFailureParity calls triggerWeightedEvent(...) for terminal recipe/catalyst failure and keeps failure reason/instability NBT.
TC4InfusionStabilityParity scan range corrected to matrixY-10..matrixY+5, matching TileInfusionMatrix#getSurroundings after the old yy loop conversion.
InfusionMatrixAuxiliaryHelper and InfusionAltarStructure now mirror stabilizers around the matrix block, not the catalyst pedestal position.
InfusionAltarStructure summary no longer gives one-sided MATRIX_STABILIZER a synthetic +10 stabilizing block bonus in the TC4 symmetry path.
Thaumometer block scans now reject aspectless targets before writing player scan knowledge or legacy NBT, preventing fake scan/progression entries.
Arcane Workbench output/shift-click stale-preview guards from v7.62 are retained; no GUI or recipe expansion was added.
Aura Node/Goggles HUD parity remains reveal-only and shares sorted aspect/ring coordinate ledger.
compile_note: Gradle wrapper compile was attempted in the sandbox but could not download Gradle 7.5.1 because external DNS/network access to services.gradle.org is blocked. Run GitHub Actions/local Gradle to build the jar. Static Java syntax guard passes.
